$postId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid)

$commentId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('authorId').val() === auth.uid)

$itemId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('sellerId').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('sellerId').val() === auth.uid)
